description: Case style: Analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: Creme dial with silver hands Strap style: Brown leather strap with a tang clasp Features: Electronic compass, declination adjustment scale, indiglo night light and date apeture on the 4 hour mark Water resistant to 100 M, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
